parameters.command:
=#!/bin/sh
set -e
JOB_DIR="{{ $json.jobDir }}"
PUBLIC_DIR="{{ $json.publicDir }}"
mkdir -p "$JOB_DIR/clips" "$PUBLIC_DIR"

for cmd in ffmpeg ffprobe python3 edge-tts; do
  command -v "$cmd" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "[PREFLIGHT ERROR] dependency tidak ditemukan: $cmd"; exit 1; }
done

FREE_KB=$(df -Pk "$JOB_DIR" | awk 'NR==2 {print $4}')
if [ -n "$FREE_KB" ] && [ "$FREE_KB" -lt 1048576 ]; then
  echo "[PREFLIGHT ERROR] Disk space kurang dari 1GB di $JOB_DIR"
  exit 1
fi

echo "PREFLIGHT_OK"
echo "DIRS_OK"

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'Workflow diterima. Mulai generate naskah dan prompt visual.', progress: 8, executionId: $execution.id, currentStage: 'content_generation', currentNode: 'Ollama: Generate Konten', stageLabel: 'Generate naskah dan prompt visual' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify((() => {
  const req = $('Normalize Request').first().json;
  const schema = {
    narasi: 'Narasi bahasa Indonesia yang natural, mendalam, storytelling kuat, minimal 1200 kata, ada hook awal dan closing bernilai.',
    video_prompts: ['English cinematic prompt per clip, photorealistic, minimum 40 words, include camera, lighting, composition, no text overlay'],
    judul: ['Judul YouTube utama', 'Alternatif 2', 'Alternatif 3'],
    judul_tiktok: 'Judul TikTok viral',
    caption_facebook: 'Caption Facebook interaktif',
    deskripsi: 'Deskripsi YouTube SEO friendly',
    tags: ['tag1', 'tag2', 'tag3'],
    thumbnail_prompt: 'YouTube thumbnail prompt 16:9 high contrast',
    character_anchor: req.characterAnchor,
    negative_prompt: req.characterNegativePrompt
  };

  const promptLines = [
    'You are an expert Indonesian storyteller and creative director for YouTube long-form videos.',
    'Return STRICT JSON only. No markdown. No extra text.',
    `Main topic: ${req.title}`,
    `Description: ${req.prompt}`,
    `Category: ${req.category}`,
    `Visual style: ${req.style}`,
    `Mood: ${req.mood}`,
    `Clip count: ${req.clipCount}`,
    `Clip duration: ${req.clipDuration} seconds`,
    `Target aspect ratio: ${req.aspectRatio} (${req.outputWidth}x${req.outputHeight})`,
    `Series ID: ${req.seriesId}`,
    `Episode number: ${req.episodeNumber}`,
    `Character anchor (must stay identical in all clips): ${req.characterAnchor}`,
    `Negative prompt (must be avoided): ${req.characterNegativePrompt}`,
    'Rules:',
    '- Narration must be in natural Indonesian and emotionally engaging.',
    '- video_prompts must be in English.',
    '- Each video prompt should be richly detailed, minimum 40 words.',
    '- Each prompt should include subject, action, environment, camera movement, lens/composition, and lighting cues.',
    '- Every video prompt must preserve the same exact character identity.',
    '- Keep face, age range, hairstyle, and skin tone consistent across all clips.',
    '- Keep wardrobe and color palette mostly consistent unless scene context forces small change.',
    '- Avoid text overlays, logos, and watermarks.',
    '- Frame composition should fit target aspect ratio and keep key subject inside safe area.',
    'Output schema:',
    JSON.stringify(schema, null, 2)
  ];

  return {
    model: req.ollamaModel,
    prompt: promptLines.join('\n'),
    stream: false,
    format: 'json',
    options: { temperature: 0.5, top_p: 0.92, num_predict: 8192 }
  };
})()) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Parse Response Ollama').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'Naskah, prompt visual, dan metadata konten sudah siap.', progress: 18, executionId: $execution.id, currentStage: 'content_ready', currentNode: 'Parse Response Ollama', stageLabel: 'Naskah dan prompt siap' }) }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
set -e
JOB_DIR="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.jobDir }}"
NARASI_PATH="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.narasiPath }}"
NARASI_TXT="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.narasiTxtPath }}"
TTS_VOICE="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.ttsVoice }}"
NARASI_B64="{{ $('Encode Base64').first().json.narasiB64 }}"

echo "[TTS] Menulis narasi ke file..."
echo "$NARASI_B64" | base64 -d > "$NARASI_TXT"

echo "[TTS] Voice: $TTS_VOICE"
echo "[TTS] Output: $NARASI_PATH"

edge-tts --file "$NARASI_TXT" --voice "$TTS_VOICE" --write-media "$NARASI_PATH"

if [ -f "$NARASI_PATH" ]; then
  duration=$(ffprobe -v quiet -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$NARASI_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  echo "TTS_OK"
  echo "AUDIO_PATH:$NARASI_PATH"
  echo "AUDIO_DURATION:$duration"
else
  echo "[TTS ERROR] File audio tidak ditemukan"
  exit 1
fi

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'Audio TTS selesai. Lanjut siapkan subtitle dan generate klip video.', progress: 32, executionId: $execution.id, currentStage: 'tts_ready', currentNode: 'Generate Subtitles', stageLabel: 'Audio TTS selesai' }) }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
set -e
CLIPS_DIR="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.clipsDir }}"
PROMPTS_B64="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.promptsB64 }}"
CHARACTER_ANCHOR_B64="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.characterAnchorB64 }}"
NEGATIVE_PROMPT_B64="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.negativePromptB64 }}"
CLIP_DURATION={{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.clipDuration }}
HF_TOKEN="{{ $('Normalize Request').first().json.huggingfaceToken }}"
if [ -z "$HF_TOKEN" ]; then
  HF_TOKEN="${HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN:-}"
fi
COMFYUI_API_URL="{{ $('Normalize Request').first().json.comfyApiUrl }}"
if [ -z "$COMFYUI_API_URL" ]; then
  COMFYUI_API_URL="${COMFYUI_API_URL:-}"
fi
COMFYUI_API_KEY="{{ $('Normalize Request').first().json.comfyApiKey }}"
if [ -z "$COMFYUI_API_KEY" ]; then
  COMFYUI_API_KEY="${COMFYUI_API_KEY:-}"
fi
COMFYUI_WORKFLOW_FILE="{{ $('Normalize Request').first().json.comfyWorkflowFile }}"
if [ -z "$COMFYUI_WORKFLOW_FILE" ]; then
  COMFYUI_WORKFLOW_FILE="${COMFYUI_WORKFLOW_FILE:-}"
fi
VIDEO_MODEL_URL="{{ $('Normalize Request').first().json.videoModelUrl }}"
if [ -z "$VIDEO_MODEL_URL" ]; then
  VIDEO_MODEL_URL="${VIDEO_MODEL_URL:-}"
fi
JOBID="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.jobId }}"
SEED_BASE={{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.characterSeed }}
REFERENCE_IMAGE_URL="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.characterRefImageUrl }}"
CONSISTENCY_STRENGTH={{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.consistencyStrength }}

echo "[CLIPS] Mendekode daftar prompts..."
echo "$PROMPTS_B64" | base64 -d > /root/.n8n-files/vidgen_${JOBID}_prompts.json
CHARACTER_ANCHOR=$(echo "$CHARACTER_ANCHOR_B64" | base64 -d || true)
NEGATIVE_PROMPT=$(echo "$NEGATIVE_PROMPT_B64" | base64 -d || true)

echo "[CLIPS] Mulai generate klip di: $CLIPS_DIR"
echo "[CLIPS] seed base: $SEED_BASE"

echo "[CLIPS] ComfyUI API URL: ${COMFYUI_API_URL:-'(not set)'}"
echo "[CLIPS] ComfyUI workflow file: ${COMFYUI_WORKFLOW_FILE:-'(not set)'}"
echo "[CLIPS] Video model URL: ${VIDEO_MODEL_URL:-'(not set)'}"
echo "[CLIPS] HF token present: $( [ -n "$HF_TOKEN" ] && echo yes || echo no )"
echo "[CLIPS] Visual fallback allowed: ${VIDGEN_ALLOW_VISUAL_FALLBACK:-false}"
echo "[CLIPS] Black video fallback allowed: ${VIDGEN_ALLOW_BLACK_VIDEO_FALLBACK:-false}"
VIDGEN_OUTPUT_WIDTH="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.outputWidth || 1280 }}"
VIDGEN_OUTPUT_HEIGHT="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.outputHeight || 720 }}"
VIDGEN_GEN_WIDTH="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.genWidth || 768 }}"
VIDGEN_GEN_HEIGHT="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.genHeight || 432 }}"
export VIDGEN_OUTPUT_WIDTH VIDGEN_OUTPUT_HEIGHT VIDGEN_GEN_WIDTH VIDGEN_GEN_HEIGHT COMFYUI_API_URL COMFYUI_API_KEY COMFYUI_WORKFLOW_FILE VIDEO_MODEL_URL

SCRIPT="/opt/vidgen/generate_clips.py"
[ -f "$SCRIPT" ] || SCRIPT="/opt/vidgen/scripts/generate_clips.py"
[ -f "$SCRIPT" ] || { echo "[CLIPS ERROR] generate_clips.py tidak ditemukan di /opt/vidgen atau /opt/vidgen/scripts"; exit 1; }

if python3 "$SCRIPT" --help 2>&1 | grep -q -- "--seed-base"; then
  echo "[CLIPS] Script support mode advanced"
  python3 "$SCRIPT" \
    --clips-dir "$CLIPS_DIR" \
    --prompts-file "/root/.n8n-files/vidgen_${JOBID}_prompts.json" \
    --hf-token "$HF_TOKEN" \
    --clip-duration "$CLIP_DURATION" \
    --seed-base "$SEED_BASE" \
    --character-anchor "$CHARACTER_ANCHOR" \
    --negative-prompt "$NEGATIVE_PROMPT" \
    --reference-image-url "$REFERENCE_IMAGE_URL" \
    --consistency-strength "$CONSISTENCY_STRENGTH"
else
  echo "[CLIPS] Script versi lama terdeteksi, fallback ke mode basic"
  python3 "$SCRIPT" \
    --clips-dir "$CLIPS_DIR" \
    --prompts-file "/root/.n8n-files/vidgen_${JOBID}_prompts.json" \
    --hf-token "$HF_TOKEN" \
    --clip-duration "$CLIP_DURATION"
fi

CLIP_COUNT=$(ls "$CLIPS_DIR"/clip_*.mp4 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "CLIPS_GENERATED:$CLIP_COUNT"
echo "CLIPS_DIR:$CLIPS_DIR"
echo "CLIPS_OK"

=#!/bin/sh
set -e
VIDGEN_OUTPUT_WIDTH="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.outputWidth || 1280 }}"
VIDGEN_OUTPUT_HEIGHT="{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.outputHeight || 720 }}"
export VIDGEN_OUTPUT_WIDTH VIDGEN_OUTPUT_HEIGHT

SCRIPT=""
for CANDIDATE in /opt/vidgen/scripts/assemble_video.py /opt/vidgen/assemble_video.py /workspace/vidgen/scripts/assemble_video.py /workspace/scripts/assemble_video.py ./scripts/assemble_video.py ./assemble_video.py; do
  [ -f "$CANDIDATE" ] && SCRIPT="$CANDIDATE" && break
done
[ -n "$SCRIPT" ] || SCRIPT="$(find /opt /workspace /data /root /home -maxdepth 5 -type f -name assemble_video.py 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)"
[ -n "$SCRIPT" ] || { echo "[FFMPEG ERROR] assemble_video.py tidak ditemukan. Pastikan script ter-mount ke container (contoh: /opt/vidgen/scripts/assemble_video.py)"; exit 1; }
echo "[FFMPEG] Pakai script: $SCRIPT"
python3 "$SCRIPT" --job-dir "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.jobDir }}" --clips-dir "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.clipsDir }}" --filelist "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.filelistPath }}" --audio "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.audio_path }}" --raw "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.rawVideoPath }}" --final "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.finalVideoPath }}" --short "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.shortVideoPath }}" --thumb "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.thumbPath }}" --srt "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.jobDir }}/subs.srt"

=#!/bin/bash
set -e
cp "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoPath }}" "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}/final.mp4"
cp "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoPath }}" "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}/short.mp4"
if [ -f "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.thumbPath }}" ]; then
  cp "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.thumbPath }}" "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}/thumb.jpg"
fi
chmod -R 755 "{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.publicDir }}"
echo "PUBLIC_OK"
echo "PUBLIC_FINAL:{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoUrl }}"
echo "PUBLIC_SHORT:{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoUrl }}"

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'Render final video selesai. Menunggu jadwal upload YouTube.', progress: 72, executionId: $execution.id, currentStage: 'render_ready', currentNode: 'Wait Until Upload Time', stageLabel: 'Render final selesai' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'Sedang mengunggah video akhir ke YouTube.', progress: 88, executionId: $execution.id, currentStage: 'youtube_uploading', currentNode: 'YouTube Upload', stageLabel: 'Upload ke YouTube' }) }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
set -e
FINAL="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.finalVideoPath }}"
SHORT="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.shortVideoPath }}"
THUMB="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.thumbPath }}"
JUDUL_YT="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.judul }}"
DESKRIPSI="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.deskripsi }}"
YT_CATEGORY="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.youtubeCategory }}"
TAGS="{{ $('Parse Hasil FFmpeg').first().json.tags.join(',') }}"

SCRIPT="/opt/vidgen/upload_platforms.py"
[ -f "$SCRIPT" ] || SCRIPT="/opt/vidgen/scripts/upload_platforms.py"
[ -f "$SCRIPT" ] || { echo "[UPLOAD ERROR] upload_platforms.py tidak ditemukan di /opt/vidgen atau /opt/vidgen/scripts"; exit 1; }

echo "[UPLOAD] menggunakan environment proses/container n8n"
echo "[UPLOAD] YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID loaded: ${YOUTUBE_CLIENT_ID:+yes}"
echo "[UPLOAD] YOUTUBE_CLIENT_SECRET loaded: ${YOUTUBE_CLIENT_SECRET:+yes}"
echo "[UPLOAD] YOUTUBE_REFRESH_TOKEN loaded: ${YOUTUBE_REFRESH_TOKEN:+yes}"

python3 "$SCRIPT" \
  --platforms "youtube" \
  --final-video "$FINAL" \
  --short-video "$SHORT" \
  --thumb "$THUMB" \
  --title-yt "$JUDUL_YT" \
  --desc-yt "$DESKRIPSI" \
  --yt-category "$YT_CATEGORY" \
  --tags "$TAGS"

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  jobId: $json.jobId,
  status: 'completed',
  message: 'Produksi dan upload YouTube selesai.',
  progress: 100,
  executionId: $execution.id,
  currentStage: 'youtube_uploaded',
  currentNode: 'Upload ke Platform',
  stageLabel: 'Upload YouTube selesai',
  finalVideoUrl: $json.finalVideoUrl,
  shortVideoUrl: $json.shortVideoUrl,
  thumbnailUrl: $json.thumbUrl,
  youtubeUrl: $json.youtubeUrl,
  outputs: {
    duration: $json.final_duration_str,
    size: $json.final_size,
    platforms: $json.uploadSummary
  }
}) }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash
set -e
JOB_DIR="{{ $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobDir }}"
JOB_ID="{{ $('Normalize Request').first().json.jobId }}"
PROMPTS_FILE="/root/.n8n-files/vidgen_${JOB_ID}_prompts.json"

case "$JOB_DIR" in
  /root/.n8n-files/vidgen_*) rm -rf "$JOB_DIR" ;;
  *) echo "[CLEANUP ERROR] jobDir tidak aman: $JOB_DIR"; exit 1 ;;
esac

rm -f "$PROMPTS_FILE"
echo "CLEANUP_OK"

=python3 - "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.narasiTxtPath }}" {{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.audio_duration }} "{{ $('Cek TTS').first().json.jobDir }}/subs.srt" <<'PY'
import sys

text_path = sys.argv[1]
duration = float(sys.argv[2])
output_path = sys.argv[3]

with open(text_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read().strip()

words = text.split()
chunks = []
current_chunk = []
current_len = 0

for word in words:
    next_len = current_len + len(word) + (1 if current_chunk else 0)
    if current_chunk and next_len > 30:
        chunks.append(" ".join(current_chunk))
        current_chunk = [word]
        current_len = len(word)
    else:
        current_chunk.append(word)
        current_len = next_len

if current_chunk:
    chunks.append(" ".join(current_chunk))

if not chunks:
    chunks = ["..."]

total_chars = sum(len(c) for c in chunks)
time_per_char = duration / total_chars if total_chars > 0 else 0

def format_time(seconds):
    h = int(seconds // 3600)
    m = int((seconds % 3600) // 60)
    s = int(seconds % 60)
    ms = int((seconds * 1000) % 1000)
    return f"{h:02d}:{m:02d}:{s:02d},{ms:03d}"

with open(output_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    current_time = 0.0
    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
        chunk_duration = len(chunk) * time_per_char
        start_time = current_time
        end_time = current_time + chunk_duration
        f.write(f"{i+1}\\n")
        f.write(f"{format_time(start_time)} --> {format_time(end_time)}\\n")
        f.write(f"{chunk}\\n\\n")
        current_time = end_time

print(f"SRT generated: {output_path}")
PY

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $('Cek TTS').first().json.jobId, status: 'processing', message: 'Subtitle otomatis selesai dibuat. Lanjut generate klip video.', progress: 40, executionId: $execution.id, currentStage: 'subtitles_ready', currentNode: 'Generate Subtitles', stageLabel: 'Subtitle siap' }) }}

parameters.dateTime: ={{ (() => { const v = $('Normalize Request').first().json.scheduledUploadAtIso; const n = new Date(); if (!v) return new Date(n.getTime() + 5000).toISOString(); const d = new Date(v); return (Number.isNaN(d.getTime()) || d.getTime() <= n.getTime()) ? new Date(n.getTime() + 5000).toISOString() : d.toISOString(); })() }}
